name: Palm dapple bold (front, full)
prompt:
A soft, natural pattern of dappled shade — the mottled shadow that sunlight casts through overhead large palm fronds onto a flat, plain surface.
a few bold, long blades of shade fanning across.
Only the cast shadow itself: soft-edged dark, semi-transparent blotches with gaps of open light between them, organic and irregular, exactly the way real dappled sunlight falls on the ground.
NOT the large palm fronds themselves and no objects at all — only the shadow they cast, carried in the alpha channel on a fully transparent background so it can be laid over any photo.
No text, no watermark, no caption, no border, no frame, no sticker sheet, no collage.
negative_prompt: leaves, branches, twigs, foliage, plants, tree, grass blades themselves, objects, subject, creature, animal, person, bright, glowing, light source, sunbeam, sky, lens flare, colorful, saturated, green, scenery, landscape, photograph of a forest, text, watermark, border, frame, white background, grey background, opaque background, solid background
